nasb.text: While Peter was reflecting on the vision, the Spirit said to him, “Behold, three men are looking for you.

esv.text: And while Peter was pondering the vision, the Spirit said to him, “Behold, three men are looking for you.

cnv.text: 彼得還在思量那異象，聖靈對他說：“你看，有三個人來找你！

ccb.text: 彼得还在苦苦思索的时候，圣灵又对他说：“彼得，外面有三个人来找你，

csbs.text: 彼得还在思考那异象的时候，圣灵对他说：“看哪，有三个人来找你！
